text.title: llamaindex-hybrid-retrieval Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for llamaindex-hybrid-retrieval as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Setting num_queries=4 because "more queries means better recall".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: 4 LLM calls fire per user query. On a corpus with reasonable coverage, queries 3 and 4 repeat near-synonyms already covered by query 2. Cost quadruples with marginal recall gain.

failure-mode.description: Using QueryFusionRetriever without use_async=True in an async agent loop.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without async, each query variant fires synchronously, blocking the event loop. At num_queries=2 this adds two sequential round-trips to the LLM before retrieval even starts.

failure-mode.description: Changing chunking strategy post-ingestion and expecting AutoMergingRetriever to work.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Parent-child node relationships are baked in at ingestion. Changing chunk_sizes requires a full re-index; there is no migration path.
